notes_short: Deterministic script governance system (SSOT YAML → Gates → CI) implemented with 22/22 items complete. Pre-merge validation: 4/4 PASS. Awaiting first CI execution (Windows + Ubuntu).
notes_detailed:
Complete implementation of deterministic script governance:

1. SSOT: scripts.policy.yaml (versioned authority)
2. DERIVED: SCRIPTS_classification.md (generated, anti-drift protected)
3. Gates: 3 PowerShell gates (policy, anti-drift, manifest) + path consistency
4. CI: Dual OS validation (Windows + Ubuntu) with pwsh support
5. Determinism: UTF-8+LF normalization, SHA256 hashes, pinned dependencies
6. Documentation: CONTRACT.md (280 lines) with paths, exit codes, maintenance

Validation:
- Pre-merge test suite: 4/4 PASS
- Drift detection: exit=2 confirmed (not 3)
- YAML parse: local validation successful
- Path consistency: zero hardcode duplication

Technical Foundation:
- policy_lib.py: 868 lines, 13 rules (HB001-HB013)
- Exit code discipline: strict 0/2/3 propagation
- Cross-platform hashing: EOL-normalized for determinism
- Self-contained CI: Python inline (no jq dependency)

Post-Merge Observations Implemented:
- requirements.txt: PyYAML==6.0.1 pinned
- CONTRACT.md section 3.4: core.autocrlf guidance

First CI execution pending (run #2) with workflow dispatch enabled for dev-changes branch.
next_action: Monitor first CI execution (Windows + Ubuntu) → Merge to main → Remove dev-changes from push trigger → Set required status checks
